$comment: scripts/PewterCity.asm PewterCityYoungsterText + PewterMovementScript_WalkToGym — the gym-guide kid marches you to BROCK's door (the simultaneous walk_both_to drag), takes his leave via the (12,18) drop + the 5-step dash (MovementData_PewterGymGuyExit, gh #70), and resets to his post shown for the next challenger. pewter_east_gate carries the same body for the pre-badge east-exit gate.

commands.text:
You're a trainer
right? BROCK's
looking for new
challengers! Follow me!

If you have the
right stuff, go
take on BROCK!
